meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no design skills (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no design skills. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve No Design Skills
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with design. Master a high-speed client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver premium, professional apps without being a designer.
content.answer_block: Eliminate design bottlenecks by leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI scaffolding and Claude Code for automated logic implementation. By decoupling visual layout from functional architecture, freelancers can deliver high-fidelity, production-ready applications in half the time, ensuring client satisfaction through consistent, clean, and modular codebases that require zero manual design work.
content.intro:
You have the logic, the architecture, and the drive, but your client’s vision is stalled by your lack of a design degree. Every hour spent wrestling with CSS grids or color palettes is an hour you aren't shipping. The gap between a functional prototype and a premium, agency-grade product has never been wider, and manual design is the single biggest anchor on your freelance profitability.

It is time to stop pretending to be a designer and start acting like a systems architect. By integrating Antigravity for structural UI generation and Claude Code for intelligent implementation, you can automate the aesthetic layer entirely. This workflow doesn't just save time; it turns your development process into a high-velocity machine, allowing you to deliver stunning, client-ready interfaces that look like they cost five figures.

steps.title: Define UI Schema in Antigravity
steps.description: Translate client requirements into a structured JSON schema. This ensures the design system is consistent before a single pixel is rendered.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a modular design system schema for a SaaS dashboard. Include color palette variables, spacing scale (4px base), and typography hierarchy for a modern, minimalist professional aesthetic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file schema.json --task 'Initialize design system variables and tailwind.config.js'

steps.title: Generate Component Library
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, accessible React components based on your established schema, preventing layout drift.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of reusable UI components including navigation, data table, and modal using Tailwind CSS. Focus on high accessibility and mobile responsiveness.

steps.title: Automate Layout Architecture
steps.description: Construct the high-level page layouts using Claude Code to assemble the generated components into a cohesive flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Assemble a dashboard layout template using the generated components. Ensure logical content hierarchy and whitespace distribution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'assemble dashboard layout using existing components in /src/components'

steps.title: Inject Functional Logic
steps.description: Connect your UI to backend services using Claude Code to handle API integration and state management automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement React Query hooks for the dashboard data fetching. Ensure optimistic updates and error handling are integrated into the UI states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'connect API endpoints to dashboard components and implement error states'

steps.title: Refine and Polish with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a final design audit, ensuring the spacing and alignment meet professional standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current UI for visual consistency. Fix any spacing anomalies or alignment issues in the generated components.

pro_tips: Always define a strict 4px spacing grid in your Antigravity prompt to prevent 'design drift' across different pages.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your UI components immediately after creation to ensure your design doesn't break during future iterations.
Export your Antigravity schema as a reusable template to slash setup time for your next 5 client projects.
Force Claude Code to use semantic HTML5 tags in all generated components to improve SEO and accessibility out of the box.
Maintain a 'design-debt' log generated by Claude Code to track minor visual tweaks that can be batched during your final client review phase.
content.next_steps: Once the layout is live, perform a user-flow audit using Claude Code to identify potential UX friction points before the final client demo.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design limitations dictate your project timeline. Master this workflow, scale your agency output, and watch your profit margins grow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
